title: HCN 生电包
description:
这是由Hong_SZ制作的生电包，内涵许多生电模组，你可以有更好的游戏体验


This is a generator pack made by Hong_SZ, which contains many generator mods, so you can have a better gaming experience
body:
# EN
## This is a commodal pack based on electricity
With this modpack, you'll have a better gaming experience
The FPS will be improved and there will be more ways to play
Built for generators
This pack contains the main multi-generator module
For example:
- MASA Family Bucket
- Carpet family buckets
- Jet synthesis
- minihud
- Minimap
Wait a minute

---

# CN
## 这是一个以生电为基础而制作的整合包
使用了这个整合包您将会获得更好的游戏体验
fps将会提高，游玩方法也会变多
为生电玩家所打造
此包包含主多生电模组
例如:
- masa全家桶
- carpet全家桶
- 喷射合成
- minihud
- 小地图
等等
